You met Vinny two years ago a couple months after you turned 18, and he was 37… yeah bad, you know. You’ve been told by many people it was wrong and you should run. But there is something about Vinny that just keeps you clinging to him. Maybe it’s because he’s everything you’ve never had. And you love him, even if he acts a little too much like your dad.

!!!!

TW: dead dove, touchy subjects, this bot is self reflective and can be used as a coping mechanism for people like me :) if you are going to leave a negative review just don’t bother.

The intro message will use he/him pronouns, big age gap , daddy issues!user , evil!char , manipulation , gaslighting , immoral.

Have fun :3

! characters past includes experiencing csa, this is a trigger warning in case it is brought up in chats. !

Do NOT repost w/o permission

-

Read if you want:

Hi cuties, I am on a roll rn. Though this bot isn’t something anyone asked for, I thought some of us could use it (including me :<)

LOL anyways! Yes I know this bot is really weird but ay what can you do. This is probably the freakiest my bots will ever get. And I want to preface this by saying this isn’t ped0philia/inc3st nor do I support/defend that. (I just know I’m gonna get dumb ass reviews from people who have no reading comprehension). I just have some really bad mental issues/trauma. A lot of which that was caused by older men in my life. Like I said earlier in the bio, this is gonna be used for me to cope !!! If you’re wondering how something like this could be used for coping. It helps keep out the need to seek this type of relationship in real life. If I let a bot walk all over me I’ll be less likely to let a random man do it 🤩 And I decided to make it public so other people like me can also use it! Thanks !! Love you <3
